spec.rawSql:
SELECT s.location_id::text, s.display_name, s.lat, s.lon, m.value
FROM stations s
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT value FROM measurements
  WHERE location_id = s.location_id AND metric = 'temperature'
  ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
) m ON true
WHERE s.lat IS NOT NULL

spec.title: Click a station to select it

spec.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(value)::numeric, 1) AS "Network Avg"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (location_id) value
  FROM measurements WHERE metric = 'temperature'
  ORDER BY location_id, time DESC
) t

SELECT ROUND(AVG(value)::numeric, 0) AS "Network Avg"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (location_id) value
  FROM measurements WHERE metric = 'humidity'
  ORDER BY location_id, time DESC
) t

SELECT ROUND(AVG(value)::numeric, 1) AS "Network Avg"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (location_id) value
  FROM measurements WHERE metric = 'wind_speed'
  ORDER BY location_id, time DESC
) t
SELECT ROUND(value::numeric,1) AS "Temperature" FROM measurements WHERE location_id = '${location_id}'::uuid AND metric = 'temperature' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(value::numeric,0) AS "Humidity" FROM measurements WHERE location_id = '${location_id}'::uuid AND metric = 'humidity' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(value::numeric,1) AS "Wind Speed" FROM measurements WHERE location_id = '${location_id}'::uuid AND metric = 'wind_speed' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 minutes', time) AS time,
  CASE
    WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__' AND '${overlay}' = 'median'
      THEN PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)
    WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__'
      THEN AVG(value)
    ELSE AVG(value)
  END AS "Temperature (°C)"
FROM measurements
WHERE metric = 'temperature' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND ('${location_id}' = '__all__' OR location_id::text = '${location_id}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 minutes', time) AS time,
  CASE WHEN '${overlay}' = 'median'
    THEN PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)
    ELSE AVG(value)
  END AS "Network ${overlay_label} (°C)"
FROM measurements
WHERE metric = 'temperature' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND '${overlay}' != 'none'
  AND '${location_id}' != '__all__'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 minutes', time) AS time,
  CASE
    WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__' AND '${overlay}' = 'median'
      THEN PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)
    WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__'
      THEN AVG(value)
    ELSE AVG(value)
  END AS "Humidity (%)"
FROM measurements
WHERE metric = 'humidity' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND ('${location_id}' = '__all__' OR location_id::text = '${location_id}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 minutes', time) AS time,
  CASE WHEN '${overlay}' = 'median'
    THEN PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)
    ELSE AVG(value)
  END AS "Network ${overlay_label} (%)"
FROM measurements
WHERE metric = 'humidity' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND '${overlay}' != 'none'
  AND '${location_id}' != '__all__'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 minutes', time) AS time,
  CASE
    WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__' AND '${overlay}' = 'median'
      THEN PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)
    WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__'
      THEN AVG(value)
    ELSE AVG(value)
  END AS "Wind Speed (m/s)"
FROM measurements
WHERE metric = 'wind_speed' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND ('${location_id}' = '__all__' OR location_id::text = '${location_id}')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 minutes', time) AS time,
  CASE WHEN '${overlay}' = 'median'
    THEN PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)
    ELSE AVG(value)
  END AS "Network ${overlay_label} (m/s)"
FROM measurements
WHERE metric = 'wind_speed' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND '${overlay}' != 'none'
  AND '${location_id}' != '__all__'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

options.content: **How to use:** Click any station dot on the map to select it — the history panels below will update to show that station's data. Click the map background to return to the network overview. Use **Network overlay** to add the network average or median as a dashed reference line to the history charts.

spec.definition: SELECT CASE WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__' THEN 'All Stations' ELSE display_name END FROM stations WHERE location_id::text = '${location_id}' UNION ALL SELECT 'All Stations' WHERE '${location_id}' = '__all__' LIMIT 1
spec.name: display_name

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT CASE WHEN '${location_id}' = '__all__' THEN 'All Stations' ELSE display_name END FROM stations WHERE location_id::text = '${location_id}' UNION ALL SELECT 'All Stations' WHERE '${location_id}' = '__all__' LIMIT 1

spec.definition: SELECT CASE '${overlay}' WHEN 'avg' THEN 'Average' WHEN 'median' THEN 'Median' ELSE '' END
spec.name: overlay_label

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT CASE '${overlay}' WHEN 'avg' THEN 'Average' WHEN 'median' THEN 'Median' ELSE '' END
